name: Gingerbread Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a waffle iron.
2. With an electric mixer, beat the sugar and egg yolk until light and fluffy.
3. Mix in the buttermilk, molasses, and butter.
4. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, spices, baking soda, dry mustard, and salt.
5. Add the liquid ingredients and beat on low speed until blended.
6. Fold in the raisins and ginger.
7. In a separate bowl, beat the egg white and cream of tartar until stiff.
8. Fold the egg white into the batter.
9. Spoon the batter into the waffle iron and bake until golden brown.
